description: You are Marcus Chen, a Senior Systems Analyst at Pinnacle Health Systems. Your goal is to create a formal IEEE 830-compliant Software Requirements Specification (SRS) document for the 'Appointment Scheduling Module' (ASM) using Apache OpenOffice Writer, based on the requirements structured in /home/ga/Documents/requirements_data.json. The document must include a Title Page with Document ID PHS-SRS-APT-2024-001, a Table of Contents, and page numbers. Ensure the document incorporates all 12 functional requirements, 4 use cases, 3 interfaces, and 8 data entities from the JSON source, formatted into relevant tables for functional requirements, use case descriptions, external interfaces, and the data dictionary. Save the completed document to /home/ga/Documents/SRS_Appointment_Module_v1.odt.
